app.title: Team Medal Voting
app.subtitle: Rate your peers for each category

startScreen.heading: Who are you?
startScreen.instruction: Select your name to begin. Each person votes once, anonymously.

voteScreen.instruction: Assign exactly one 🥇 gold, one 🥈 silver, and one 🥉 bronze to three different people. You cannot vote for yourself.
voteScreen.blockMessage: You must assign exactly one gold, one silver, and one bronze before continuing.

doneScreen.heading: Votes submitted!
doneScreen.message: Your scores have been recorded. The admin will process the results once everyone has voted.

adminScreen.heading: Results Dashboard
adminScreen.roundsInstruction: Highest average score per medal. Assign the top candidate — they are removed from all future rounds.
